general.name: mos_target_skies_v1_parquet
general.description: This table stores the positions used as blank sky regions for DR20 targetting. The sky regions are selected by dividing the sky in tiles of HEALpix nside 32. Each tile is then subdivided in candidate regions of HEALpix nside 32768 and the pixels that meet the isolation requirements are considered valid skies. This process is repeated for a number of all-sky catalogues. See ">https://sdss.org/dr20/targeting/fps/sky/"> for further details of the process by which suitable sky locations are selected in SDSS-V/FPS. This version of the skies catalog was used for v0.1 target selection. The skies_v2 catalog was used for v0.5 and subsequent target selections.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_skies_v1.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pix_32768.name: pix_32768
pix_32768.description: The HEALpix pixel (nside=32768, nested indexing, Equatorial coords) of the sky region.

ra.name: ra
ra.description: The RA of the centre of the sky pixel.

dec.name: dec
dec.description: The declination of the centre of the sky pixel.

down_pix.name: down_pix
down_pix.description: The HEALpix pixel (nside=256, nested indexing, Equatorial coords) of the sky region. Used internally to downsample the list of candidate region.

tile_32.name: tile_32
tile_32.description: The HEALpix pixel (nside=32, nested indexing, Equatorial coords) of the sky region.

gaia_sky.name: gaia_sky
gaia_sky.description: Whether this is a valid sky region in the Gaia DR2 catalogue.

sep_neighbour_gaia.name: sep_neighbour_gaia
sep_neighbour_gaia.description: Separation to the nearest Gaia DR2 neighbour.

mag_neighbour_gaia.name: mag_neighbour_gaia
mag_neighbour_gaia.description: Magnitude of the nearest Gaia DR2 neighbour (G band, Vega).

ls8_sky.name: ls8_sky
ls8_sky.description: Whether this is a valid sky region in the Legacy Survey DR8 catalogue.

sep_neighbour_ls8.name: sep_neighbour_ls8
sep_neighbour_ls8.description: Separation to the nearest Legacy Survey DR8 neighbour.

mag_neighbour_ls8.name: mag_neighbour_ls8
mag_neighbour_ls8.description: Magnitude of the nearest Legacy Survey DR8 neighbour (r-band, AB).

tmass_sky.name: tmass_sky
tmass_sky.description: Whether this is a valid sky region in the 2MASS point source catalogue.

sep_neighbour_tmass.name: sep_neighbour_tmass
sep_neighbour_tmass.description: Separation to the nearest 2MASS point source neighbour.

mag_neighbour_tmass.name: mag_neighbour_tmass
mag_neighbour_tmass.description: Magnitude of the nearest 2MASS point source neighbour (H band, Vega).

tycho2_sky.name: tycho2_sky
tycho2_sky.description: Whether this is a valid sky region in the Tycho2 catalogue.

sep_neighbour_tycho2.name: sep_neighbour_tycho2
sep_neighbour_tycho2.description: Separation to the nearest Tycho2 neighbour.

mag_neighbour_tycho2.name: mag_neighbour_tycho2
mag_neighbour_tycho2.description: Magnitude of the nearest Tycho2 neighbour (Vt band, Vega).

tmass_xsc_sky.name: tmass_xsc_sky
tmass_xsc_sky.description: Whether this is a valid sky region in the 2MASS extended source catalogue.

sep_neighbour_tmass_xsc.name: sep_neighbour_tmass_xsc
sep_neighbour_tmass_xsc.description: Separation to the nearest 2MASS extended source neighbour

mag_neighbour_tmass_xsc.name: mag_neighbour_tmass_xsc
mag_neighbour_tmass_xsc.description: Magnitude of the nearest 2MASS extended source neighbour (H band, Vega).
